extracted_fields.producer_address: Produced and bottled by Redwood Cellars, Napa, CA
extracted_fields.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
